svg.title: Illustrative Safe Exec onboarding view
svg.desc: An illustrative SVG mockup of the Safe Exec onboarding guide, keybinding advice, policy bundles, and status bar. It is not a real VS Code screenshot.

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
